info.title: AI Lead Generation System
info.description: Autonomous system to discover, qualify, enrich, and outreach to local businesses using AI-driven multi-touchpoint campaigns.

get.description: System health check endpoint to verify API availability and environment configuration.

HTTP GET endpoint for the embedded 1x1 tracking pixel.
Registers an 'open' event and returns a transparent GIF.

HTTP GET endpoint for wrapped hyperlink redirection.
Registers a 'click' event before issuing an HTTP 307 Redirect.

post.description:
Parses payload data from the Brevo SMTP gateway webhook.
Translates 'delivered' and 'bounced' states to local database entities.

Triggers a specific pipeline stage immediately.
Accepts: 'all' | 'discovery' | 'qualification' | 'personalization' | 'outreach' | 'report' | 'optimization'

get.description: Returns the current status of the pipeline, recent reports, and scheduled jobs.

post.description: Writes PRODUCTION_STATUS=HOLD to .env file to pause pipeline execution safely.
Writes PRODUCTION_STATUS=RUN to .env file to resume pipeline execution.

get.description:
Retrieves a paginated, optionally filtered list of discovered leads.
Supports filtering by lifecycle status, geographic city, business category, and discovery date range.

Exports the filtered lead set as a downloadable CSV attachment.
Applies the same filter criteria as the list endpoint.
Retrieves the full profile for a single lead including enrichment data, lifecycle timestamps, follow-up metadata, and social network records.

patch.description:
Partially updates a lead status and/or notes.
Used by administrators to manually override lifecycle statuses or annotate leads.

schema.title: Response List Campaigns Api V1 Campaigns Get

get.description: Retrieves all outreach campaigns sorted by date (newest first).
Retrieves a specific campaign with eagerly loaded email outreach records.

Computes real-time engagement statistics for a given campaign.
Cross-references funnel metrics: discovered, qualified, sent, opened, clicked, replied.

schema.title: Response List Reports Api V1 Reports Get

get.description: Retrieves all daily pipeline reports sorted by date (newest first).
Retrieves the daily pipeline report for a specific calendar date.
Downloads the Excel workbook generated for the specified daily report.

Handles unsubscribe requests via the unique tracking token.
Updates the lead status to 'unsubscribed' and disables follow-ups.
